# Class-Level Skill Policy

Reusable rule set distilled from recent skill-library maintenance work.

- Prefer one umbrella skill per class of work.
- If a session exposes a reusable workflow, pitfall, or preference, patch the umbrella skill and add a short reference file instead of creating a one-off skill.
- Keep `SKILL.md` focused on durable workflow and routing guidance; push session-specific details, examples, and checklists into `references/`.
- Add `templates/` only for copy-modify starter artifacts.
- Add `scripts/` only for deterministic checks or repeatable automation.
- If two skills overlap materially, note the overlap in the reply and let the curator consolidate later.
- Treat “do nothing” as a failure mode when a session produced a reusable improvement.
